flags.title: Payout po_demo_001 is short by $31.42
flags.detail: Stripe paid $7,905.85 but its 120 transactions net to $7,937.27. Usually late refunds or fee timing — the transaction list in the CSV shows which.

flags.title: 2 refunds hit already-settled money
flags.detail: $31.42 was refunded on charges that already paid out. Your next payout will be smaller by that amount — this is the #1 cause of "why is my payout short?"

flags.title: 3 payments failed
flags.detail: $197.00 in attempted charges did not go through. Worth a retry email if these are subscriptions.

plainEnglish: Stripe processed 148 payments for $10,130.94 gross. Fees were $338.19, and refunds totaled $31.42.
0 of 1 payouts matched exactly. The difference on the rest is explained in the flags below — nothing here looks scary, but it deserves a one-minute look.
3 items need a quick look — listed in order of urgency. Each one says exactly what to check.
